brief: US and Iran escalate strikes for seventh consecutive night amid Strait of Hormuz conflict, while Trump threatens new tariffs on Canada over wildfire smoke. Research papers examine professional identities in writing instruction and multimodal literacy in children's compositions.
news_summary: US strikes on Iran continue for seventh night as Hormuz conflict intensifies; Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over wildfire smoke drifting into US cities. Other stories include Farage's clash with Times editor, new Israeli settlement plans, and a boat tragedy in San Francisco Bay.
papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors shaping second language writing instructors' identities, multimodal composition in children's writing, and the effects of ChatGPT revision on rhetorical moves.

en.brief: US and Iran escalate strikes for seventh consecutive night amid Strait of Hormuz conflict, while Trump threatens new tariffs on Canada over wildfire smoke. Research papers examine professional identities in writing instruction and multimodal literacy in children's compositions.
en.news_summary: US strikes on Iran continue for seventh night as Hormuz conflict intensifies; Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over wildfire smoke drifting into US cities. Other stories include Farage's clash with Times editor, new Israeli settlement plans, and a boat tragedy in San Francisco Bay.
en.papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors shaping second language writing instructors' identities, multimodal composition in children's writing, and the effects of ChatGPT revision on rhetorical moves.

zh.brief: 今日重點：世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙，最高獎金5000萬美元；英國工黨貝安德就任黨魁，中英關係引關注；美伊衝突持續第七夜。研究方面，多篇探討二語寫作、AI編碼代理安全及運動可視化敘事。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽阿根廷vs西班牙，梅西與新生代對決；英國工黨貝安德就任黨魁，中英關係受矚目；美軍連續第七晚打擊伊朗，荷姆茲海峽緊張升級。香港禁書清單再擴，特朗普揚言對加拿大徵稅。
zh.papers_summary: 研究聚焦二語寫作中的名詞短語複雜性、ChatGPT對個人陳述的修訂影響，以及AI編碼代理被文檔設置攻擊的風險。另有人機協作拋接球規劃與游泳視頻可視化敘事研究。

todays_image.caption: Like the shipwreck in the image, the escalating Hormuz conflict threatens to sink regional stability and maritime safety.
todays_image.title: Shipwreck
